title: Crispy Garlic Korean Stir-fry
description: A vibrant and aromatic brunch dish featuring a blend of crispy garlic and fresh parsley in a Korean-inspired stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 1 lb ground beef
ingredients.notes: Use halal-certified meat for this recipe.

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add sesame oil and wait until it shimmers.
Add ground beef to the hot pan and cook for about 3-4 minutes, breaking into small pieces as needed. Remove from pan.
In the same pan, add minced garlic and stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add red bell pepper and onion; stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes or until vegetables are just tender.
Return ground beef to the pan with vegetables, then pour in soy sauce. Stir everything together well.
Garnish with chopped parsley on top before serving.
